# Infrastructure as Code — Daily DevOps & .NET

> Manage infrastructure through code using declarative definitions, version control, and automation to achieve consistency, repeatability, and auditability.

Source: https://daily-devops.net/tags/infrastructure-as-code/

## About this topic

- [Topic landing page](https://daily-devops.net/tags/infrastructure-as-code/): Manage infrastructure through code using declarative definitions, version control, and automation to achieve consistency, repeatability, and auditability.

## Articles tagged "Infrastructure as Code" (2)

- [Why Your Azure Portal Clicks Will Fail the Next Audit](https://daily-devops.net/posts/infrastructure-as-code-compliance-bicep/): Azure Portal clicks fail ISO 27017 Control CLD 6.3.1. Move to Bicep so Git history becomes the audit trail and pull requests the change control.
- [Your Azure SQL Backups Won't Save You (Here's Why)](https://daily-devops.net/posts/backup-recovery-azure-sql-database/): Azure SQL's seven-day default retention is a compliance time bomb. Configure long-term backup, geo-replication, and tested restores in Bicep.
